case_title: MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. VS ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE
CERTIFIED MAIL TO BO MONEY RETURNED ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $262.79, DEFT. TO CEASE USING CLIENT LIST OF FOCUS AND DOWN LOAD IT FROM HER COMPUTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ADAMAPOULOS CONSTANCE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO PLAINTIFF MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION & POS TURNED IN UNTIMELY NOT 3 DAYS BEFORE.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO PLAINTIFF MONEY BO DBA FOCUS MGMT. HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
